text.title: Bundle vs Split Tools Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is total tool count ≥ 25 OR tool-selection error rate > 5%?

conclusion.verdict: Default split. No methodology action needed.

branch.when: needs_action == true AND bundleable == true AND eval_ok == true

conclusion.verdict: Bundle this group with enum-constrained mode arg. Document per-mode descriptions including "do NOT use" lines.

branch.when: needs_action == true AND bundleable == true AND eval_ok == false

conclusion.verdict: Revert to split. Per-mode descriptions failed to disambiguate; quality drop exceeds 2%.
No suitable bundle group. Refactor offending tools (clearer names, better descriptions) instead.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
